comparison_policy: Validate capability ownership, conditional dispositions, gate precedence, authority, and forbidden dependencies. Extra proportional capabilities and documented controller re-entry are allowed; exact total-order equality is not required.
limitations: These contracts validate authored semantic routing policy and recorded route receipts. They do not prove that a fresh Codex task loaded a skill, produced delivery artifacts, executed checks, or respected authority unless corresponding live evidence is recorded.

scenarios.prompt: Clarify and plan this small bug fix.

conditional_capabilities.when: the fix changes a contract, compatibility boundary, recovery behavior, or established design
test strategy requires specialist depth beyond the compact plan

stop_conditions: do not edit files
do not claim an unverified root cause

scenarios.prompt: Design and implement this medium-sized feature.

conditional_capabilities.when: risk classification identifies security, privacy, reliability, infrastructure, migration, or operational depth
external sources or systems of record require reconciliation or authorized mutation
a meaningful delivery outcome, failure, or reusable learning exists

stop_conditions: implementation waits for Ready and Design gates
publishing requires separate authority

scenarios.prompt: Break this large initiative into a series of PRs.

conditional_capabilities.when: initiative evidence exposes sensitive, privileged, infrastructure, migration, reliability, or high-blast-radius concerns
teams, trackers, external dependencies, status, or communication require synchronization

stop_conditions: do not invent owners or dates
do not implement under planning authority

scenarios.prompt: Review this existing PR for release readiness.

conditional_capabilities.when: quality evidence is missing, failing, stale, disputed, quantitative, or requires execution or triage
the diff or release surface is security, privacy, reliability, infrastructure, migration, or operationally material
canonical documentation or release communication is missing or inconsistent

stop_conditions: do not implement fixes
do not self-approve missing evidence

scenarios.prompt: Prepare this completed change for production release.

conditional_capabilities.when: quality evidence is missing, failing, stale, disputed, quantitative, or requires execution or triage
version, changelog, release notes, migration, configuration, runbook, or support knowledge is missing or inconsistent
required independent review or release-readiness adjudication is missing, stale, or unresolved
security, privacy, reliability, dependency, migration, observability, rollback, or operational evidence is missing or material
release status, external systems, handoff, or communication require synchronization

stop_conditions: preparation does not authorize merge, tag, publish, deploy, flag change, or communication

scenarios.prompt: Document and hand off this operational change.

conditional_capabilities.when: documentation examples, runbook steps, configuration, or recovery procedures require execution or measurable validation

stop_conditions: external document mutation routes through delivery coordination
do not invent support commitments

scenarios.prompt: Design this change but do not implement it.

conditional_capabilities.when: the design crosses sensitive, privileged, infrastructure, migration, reliability, or high-blast-radius boundaries

stop_conditions: stop before planning and implementation

scenarios.prompt: Review this change without modifying it.

conditional_capabilities.when: validation must be executed or quality evidence is missing, failing, stale, disputed, or quantitative
security, privacy, reliability, infrastructure, migration, or operational depth is material
the requested decision includes integration or release readiness

stop_conditions: do not edit
do not suppress uncertain material candidates

scenarios.prompt: Make this documentation-only change.

conditional_capabilities.when: documentation concerns security, privacy, permissions, operations, migration, or recovery
documentation changes a versioned, release, migration, configuration, or operational contract

stop_conditions: do not invent code test results
do not create duplicate documentation

scenarios.prompt: Handle this production incident and hotfix.

conditional_capabilities.when: repair sequencing, dependencies, ownership, or deferred-gate planning exceed a compact incident checklist
runbooks, status, recovery, configuration, support, or release knowledge changes
time and blast radius permit independent hotfix or release review
provider state, incident status, escalation, handoff, or separately authorized communication requires synchronization
the incident reaches a meaningful recovery, failure, or cancelled-outcome boundary

stop_conditions: production action stays within incident authority
communication requires separate authority

scenarios.prompt: Turn these meeting notes into tracked follow-up.

conditional_capabilities.when: notes contain ambiguous behavior or proposed requirements that need confirmation
confirmed actions require dependency-safe work structure
confirmed decisions or knowledge must update a canonical durable source

stop_conditions: notes do not silently create work
draft authority does not authorize send or write

scenarios.prompt: Reconcile the tracker, specification, and repository status.

conditional_capabilities.when: repository or project context is missing or contradictory
canonical specification or status documentation must change
reconciliation identifies delivery-plan, dependency, milestone, or ownership changes

stop_conditions: do not silently choose between contradictory sources
no write without exact target and authority

scenarios.prompt: Review this security-sensitive diff, including suppressed and deferred candidates.

conditional_capabilities.when: candidate validation requires execution, measurement, scanner triage, or missing/failing quality evidence
the review must make a release-blocking disposition

stop_conditions: uncertain material candidates remain open or deferred
suppression is not risk acceptance

scenarios.prompt: Triage this flaky CI failure when some provider logs are unavailable.

conditional_capabilities.when: provider access, external status, escalation, or communication requires cross-system coordination

stop_conditions: no blind retry
do not claim CI parity without provider evidence

scenarios.prompt: Assess a failed staged deployment controlled by a feature flag.

conditional_capabilities.when: reproduction, rollback verification, telemetry validation, or regression evidence requires specialist execution
provider state, incident status, escalation, or communication requires synchronization
the incident reaches a meaningful recovery, failure, or cancelled-outcome boundary

stop_conditions: no flag or deployment mutation without authority
pipeline success is not user recovery

scenarios.prompt: Plan and deliver a preview environment with a data migration.

conditional_capabilities.when: provider mutation, shared environment ownership, status, handoff, or teardown synchronization is involved
the preview delivery produces a meaningful result, failure, or reusable learning

stop_conditions: do not invent an environment
code rollback does not imply data rollback

scenarios.prompt: Validate this platform performance, packaging, signing, or distribution claim.

conditional_capabilities.when: the claim requires independent or release-readiness adjudication beyond the evidence owner
validated results change canonical platform, packaging, signing, or distribution guidance

required_evidence: exact revision, device, runtime, build, data, and run count
stop_conditions: packaging is not signing, notarization, deployment, or distribution
do not generalize from a noisy sample

scenarios.prompt: Validate this platform performance claim without changing the product.

conditional_capabilities.when: measurement exercises privileged, sensitive, production, resource-exhaustion, or supply-chain surfaces
independent adjudication is required for a release or public claim
the measurement gates a release or artifact decision
validated results change canonical performance guidance or a durable claim

required_evidence: exact revision, device, runtime, build, data, run count, and threshold
stop_conditions: do not modify the product
do not generalize from a noisy or incomparable sample

scenarios.prompt: Validate this package artifact without signing, notarizing, publishing, or distributing it.

conditional_capabilities.when: artifact provenance, permissions, contents, dependencies, or supply-chain exposure is material
independent release-readiness adjudication is required
validated packaging behavior changes canonical build or release guidance

required_evidence: exact revision, build, package path or digest, platform, and packaging command
stop_conditions: package validation does not authorize signing, notarization, publication, deployment, or distribution

scenarios.prompt: Audit this signing and notarization claim without performing either action.

conditional_capabilities.when: independent attestation or release-readiness adjudication is required
validated results change canonical signing, notarization, or release guidance

expected_artifacts: certificate or identity metadata without secrets
required_evidence: exact revision, artifact digest, platform, signature metadata, and notarization record
stop_conditions: do not access private signing material
do not sign, re-sign, submit, staple, publish, or distribute

scenarios.prompt: Validate this distribution claim without publishing, deploying, or changing external state.

conditional_capabilities.when: authorized provider reads, distribution status, target reconciliation, escalation, or communication is required
independent release-readiness adjudication is required
validated results change canonical distribution or support guidance

required_evidence: exact revision, artifact digest, distribution channel, environment, and current provider state
stop_conditions: do not upload, publish, deploy, promote, distribute, change access, or communicate externally
